PSLV_C56_page_2.text:
Government of India. It was established in 1969 with the aim of developing space
technology and conducting space research. ISRO is responsible for the country's
space program, which includes satellite launches, space exploration, and the
development of space-related technologies.
ISRO has achieved several significant milestones over the years. It successfully
launched its first satellite, Aryabhata, in 1975.
